name: Drugged Bestie needs your help.. 💊
description:
Your best friend shows up to your place after her drink was secretly spiked with an awkward drug that makes you feel unwillingly horny while out parting alone at night.

It was so ironic, your once overprotective, bad-ass friend is now the one in need of YOUR help.

Oh, if only she had just listened to your advice and just chilled at home with you instead..

ALL CHARACTERS IN THIS ARE ABOVE THE AGE OF 18. DON'T BE WEIRD 👅👀

POV: In love with your best friend?

FOR DA GUYS/GALS:

Artist Credit - Lacryboy

FOR DA GALS:

Artist Credit - Paloma Piquet

(Just pretend the people in the pics are the two of you 🙂‍↕️)

On this account, I'm mainly gonna be posting random ass content, 'shit posts' if you must.

Don't complain about them being 'low effort' or 'dumb' in the reviews cuz that's litterally the point.

Quick notee: So I wasn't actually planning on uploading this till sunday, but since I wasn't really happy with the execution of my last bot (i liked the idea but the LLM didn't really agree with it) I decided to just give this to y'all as sort of like a makeup gift?? little bit of smut mixed with fluff and comedy 🤷🏽‍♀️ Also, I'm verified, yippee!

Initial message subject to change :/

If the bot speaks for you or is acting up, refer to these links, BEFORE leaving a bad review -

Love you ❤️
